channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The help that many older Americans need most
item.description: Community healthcare workers prevent older adults from falling through the cracks amid shortages.

item.title: Late-night eating is one thing — this can make it worse
item.description: What you eat late at night may matter as much as when you eat.

item.title: Most important sleep habits for longevity
item.description: Experts share three research-backed strategies for deeper, consistent sleep.

item.title: One trait linked to 28% lower dementia risk
item.description: Research identifies a personality trait as a strong predictor of brain health.
